verses.text: The LORD: whoever gives his seed to Molech — put to death; the people stone him. I set My face against him, cut him off. If the people hide their eyes — I set My face against him and his family, all who go a-whoring after Molech. Guidance: Child sacrifice to Molech was Canaan's worst horror. God's law refuses both the act and the silence — those who look away share the guilt. Some sins demand the camp to speak.

The soul that turns to familiar spirits and wizards, going a-whoring after them — I will set My face against that soul, cut him off from his people. Guidance: Consulting mediums is whoring — the same verb God uses for idolatry. God's people have one Voice to listen to. Spiritual curiosity in dark places carries the same penalty as desertion.

Sanctify yourselves and be holy: for I am the LORD your God. Keep My statutes and do them: I am the LORD that sanctifies you. Guidance: Holiness has two sides — yours and His. You sanctify yourselves; He sanctifies you. Effort meets gift. The same verb on both lines — sometimes obedience is its own grace.

Sanctify yourselves and be holy: for I am the LORD your God. Keep My statutes and do them: I am the LORD that sanctifies you. Guidance: Holiness has two sides — yours and His. You sanctify yourselves; He sanctifies you. Effort meets gift. The same verb on both lines — sometimes obedience is its own grace.

He that curseth his father or his mother shall surely be put to death; his blood shall be upon him. Guidance: Cursing parents — speaking death over those who gave you life — is a capital crime. The fifth commandment with teeth. The family is the smallest cell of covenant; sin against it is sin against God.

Adulterer with a neighbor's wife — both put to death. Lying with father's wife or daughter-in-law — both put to death. Lying with mankind as womankind — put to death. Woman and her mother — burned with fire. Lying with a beast — death, slay the beast. Woman with any beast — kill both. Guidance: God's law treats sex as life-and-death because it shapes families and futures. None of these acts can be undone; the harshness of the penalty matches the depth of the violation. Holiness has teeth.

Sister (father's or mother's daughter) — wicked, cut off. Lying with menstruating woman — both cut off. Mother's or father's sister — bear iniquity. Uncle's wife — die childless. Brother's wife — unclean, childless. Guidance: Lesser penalties than death — being cut off or dying childless. God grades sin precisely; not every wrong carries the same weight. Childlessness as judgment was a grief Israel keenly understood. Some sins quietly close the future.

Keep My statutes; the land vomit you not out as it vomited those before. I said: ye shall inherit their land — I separated you from people. Distinguish clean and unclean beasts and fowls. Be holy unto Me, for I the LORD am holy; I have severed you that ye should be Mine. Guidance: The land remembers. The Canaanites lost it for these sins; if Israel does the same, geography won't favor heritage. God separated Israel for Himself — even diet and reverence keep that line.

A man or woman that has a familiar spirit, or that is a wizard, shall surely be put to death; they shall stone them with stones; their blood shall be upon them. Guidance: The chapter ends as it began — mediums under the same death penalty as Molech. Two endpoints, child sacrifice and necromancy, both bracket the holiness code. God refuses traffic with darkness, no matter the dressing.
